title: Workspace Schema / Membership Baseline
summary: Introduces workspaces, workspace_members, and workspace_invites tables via migration 0011_gl224_workspace_schema_membership_baseline. Backfills existing demo-tenant resource rows to the canonical default workspace.

backfill_strategy.description: A canonical workspace (id='default', tenant_id='demo') is inserted if not present. All existing resource rows in the demo tenant with workspace_id=NULL are updated to workspace_id='default'. Non-demo tenants are not touched. The backfill is idempotent.

workspaces.notes: status defaults to 'active'. slug is URL-friendly name, unique per tenant.

workspace_members.notes: role defaults to 'workspace_member'. Unique per (workspace, operator) pair.

workspace_invites.notes: email stored as hash only (privacy). status defaults to 'pending'.

steps: UPDATE resource tables SET workspace_id = NULL WHERE workspace_id = 'default'
rollback_strategy.note: Rollback is manual. No automated rollback script in this baseline sprint.

production_readiness_impact.production_saas: NO-GO — workspace schema is a prerequisite but does not itself enable Production SaaS
production_readiness_impact.real_customer_data: NO-GO — no real customer data introduced or enabled
production_readiness_impact.live_postgresql_production_readiness: NO-GO — migration tested against SQLite in-memory; PostgreSQL path is supported by the runner but not gate-tested in this sprint

next_issues: GL-225: Workspace API — POST /workspaces, GET /workspaces, POST /workspaces/{id}/members
GL-226: Workspace enforcement in policy engine and resource CRUD
GL-227: Cross-workspace isolation enforcement and audit propagation
